name: ARRIVE Albuquerque
content: ARRIVE is a hotel in downtown Albuquerque. The location was quite nice, near a park and several stores. They have a pool and some interesting books in the lobby. I'm not sure you're supposed to read the books in the loby, but I was under the influence of a single altitude beer and could not care less An altitude beer is equivalent to two regular beers, but more fun.. I enjoyed my stay.
